Motion Of Defendants To Exclude Plaintiffs Disclosed Experts From Trial
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas A. Prutton, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. PRUTTON, T:925.677.5080, for plaintiff/opposing party;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: Hearing was held. After hearing, the Court ruled as follows:

DEFENDANTS AGESONG INC., PACIFIC INSTITUTE's Motion To Exclude Plaintiff's Disclosed Experts From Trial is DENIED.

Judge Pro Tem: Maxwell Pritt; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Motion Of Defendants To Exclude Plaintiffs Disclosed Experts From Trial
Off Calendar Jan-30-2020 Continued To Feb-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas Prutton, Esq. 925-677-5080 for Plaintiff.
Colin Howard, Esq. 415-262-8529 of Lewis Brisbois for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Defendant contests the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AGESONG INC., PACIFIC INSTITUTE's Motion To Exclude Plaintiffs Disclosed Experts From Trial.

Continued to be heard on the discovery calendar. The matter will be heard at 9:00 a.m. in room 301 on February 6, 2020.
